ogTitle: Drewvale vs Drillham South: Climate Safety

heading: Drewvale vs Drillham South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Drewvale, Queensland and Drillham South, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Drillham South has a lower overall climate risk score (24/100) compared to Drewvale (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Drewvale or Drillham South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Drewvale has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Drillham South scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Drewvale scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Drillham South scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Drewvale or Drillham South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Drillham South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
